emails.subject: my resume
emails.body: Molly, We would like to bring this student as a summer intern (the last one, we are running out of space). I shall send you another message regarding his proposed dates. Thanks. I hope you have a very Happy Easter. Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 04/13/2001 10:03 AM Zhendong Xia <dengie@isye.gatech.edu> on 04/12/2001 03:58:25 PM
